prompt: The tests in test_project.py are failing because they import retrieve_data instead of fetch_data. The function was renamed in the spec but the codebase still uses the old name. Rename fetch_data to retrieve_data, fetch_data_batch to retrieve_data_batch, fetch_data_cached to retrieve_data_cached, fetch_data_with_retry to retrieve_data_with_retry, fetch_data_or_default to retrieve_data_or_default, fetch_data_monitored to retrieve_data_monitored, and fetch_data_batch_monitored to retrieve_data_batch_monitored across ALL files. Run tests to verify.
on_fail: Some tests are still failing. Make sure you renamed every occurrence in every file — check imports, function definitions, function calls, and docstrings.

goals.description: Grep for fetch_data, read all 7 source files, rename in each with multi-edit, verify. Ideal: ~12 turns. Inefficient: 25+ turns with per-file read-edit-check cycles.
